summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed open PRs. No GitHub mutations, merges, fixes, or closeouts are planned. Three security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; the remaining open PRs are kept for ordinary maintainer/backlog handling because they are viable or blocked by proof/review/check state, not boring duplicate/low-signal closeouts.
